mapper.insert: /* 동의: 행위 시점 동의 이력 기록 */ INSERT INTO AGREE_HISTORY (USR_SN, BID_SN, AUC_SN, PT_LDG_SN, TRD_DSP_SN, TRD_SN, AGR_TYPE_CD, AGR_ACT_TYPE_CD, AGR_HST_AGR_YN) VALUES (#{usrSn}, #{bidSn}, #{aucSn}, #{ptLdgSn}, #{trdDspSn}, #{trdSn}, #{agrTypeCd}, #{agrActTypeCd}, #{agrHstAgrYn})
mapper.select: /* 동의: 회원별 이력 (최신순 100건) */ SELECT AGR_HST_SN AS agrHstSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, BID_SN AS bidSn, AUC_SN AS aucSn, PT_LDG_SN AS ptLdgSn, TRD_DSP_SN AS trdDspSn, TRD_SN AS trdSn, AGR_TYPE_CD AS agrTypeCd, AGR_ACT_TYPE_CD AS agrActTypeCd, AGR_HST_AGR_YN AS agrHstAgrYn, AGR_HST_REG_DT AS agrHstRegDt FROM AGREE_HISTORY WHERE USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY AGR_HST_SN DESC LIMIT 100
